title: Dil Diya Dard Liya
actors: Dilip Kumar, Waheeda Rehman, Pran Sikand
plot: A kind-hearted, widowed landlord, Thakur, lives a wealthy lifestyle with his son, Ramesh; daughter, Roopa; and an adopted child, Shankar. Ramesh hates Shankar and often abuses him. Years pass by, Thakur has passed away, and all th...
